abilities.description: Return CARDNAME to its owner's hand.

statics.description: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked.
Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, cloak the top card of your library, then attach CARDNAME to it. (To cloak a card, put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature with ward {2}. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)
